- About Us

- Contact Us

In our journey through life, we are constantly striving to turn our personal and professional aspirations into reality. Amidst the pressure to excel, we often face emotional and psychological challenges that disturb our peace of mind.

However, by seeking counseling services, we can address these overlooked aspects of our well-being. The center comprises a team of professional counselors and empathetic student coordinators who can assist you academically and emotionally. Through counseling, you can learn to make better choices, enhance interpersonal skills, build confidence, and improve your educational effectiveness. In one-on-one sessions, counselors provide guidance to explore and express feelings, challenge beliefs, evaluate behaviors, and work towards positive changes.

### Hours and Appointments

Counseling Services is open Monday-Friday from 9.30 a.m.- 5.30 p.m.

Emergency cases are dealt on priority bases and are available 24/7.

Appointments can be made through eg-portal, or individually reaching out to any of the Institute Counselor.

Phone (office)- 0191-2570730

Email: counselling.services@iitjammu.ac.in

Helplines (accessible through intranet)

# Page Title: IIT Jammu Counselling - Student Support Services

### About Us

In our journey through life, we are constantly striving to turn our personal and professional aspirations into reality. Amidst the pressure to excel, we often face emotional and psychological challenges that disturb our peace of mind.
However, by seeking counseling services, we can address these overlooked aspects of our well-being. The center comprises a team of professional counselors and empathetic student coordinators who can assist you academically and emotionally. Through counseling, you can learn to make better choices, enhance interpersonal skills, build confidence, and improve your educational effectiveness. In one-on-one sessions, counselors provide guidance to explore and express feelings, challenge beliefs, evaluate behaviors, and work towards positive changes.

**Himanshi Singh**

Himanshi Singh RCI licensed Clinical Psychologist, working at IIT Jammu since 2021. She did her M.Phil in Clinical Psychology from PGIMS, Rohtak, Haryana. She had an experience of working with AIIMS, New Delhi.

She has been extensively trained in various forms of psychological assessments and psychotherapy including individual therapy (eg., Cognitive behavior therapy, mindfulness, behavior therapy and family therapy. Your mental health is as important as your physical health.

Some common challenges one faces are anxiety, anger, loneliness, procrastination, home sickness, bullying, peer pressure, relationship issues, depression, etc.

Monday to Thursday (9.30 am to 5.30 pm)- Services- assessment, psychotherapeutic intervention (Individual and group sessions), psychiatric support

Contact details for Counselling section at IIT Jammu. Email: counselling.services@iitjammu.ac.in. Phone: 0191-2570730. Working Hours: Monday to Friday: 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM.

Himanshi Singh is an Institute Counselor in the Counselling section at IIT Jammu. Email: himanshi.singh@iitjammu.ac.in. Phone: 9797894944. Office: Level 108, 01-GH-I-45. Bio/profile: Himanshi Singh RCI licensed Clinical Psychologist, working at IIT Jammu since 2021. She did her M.Phil in Clinical Psychology from PGIMS, Rohtak, Haryana. She had an experience of working with AIIMS, New Delhi.

She has been extensively trained in various forms of psychological assessments and psychotherapy including individual therapy (eg., Cognitive behavior therapy, mindfulness, behavior therapy and family therapy. She has expertise in providing therapy for depression, anxiety, academic stress, OCD, adjustment, substance use (tobacco, alcohol, cannabis, opioids, etc.), trauma, anger issues, relationship issues, issues related to transition and change, uncertainties about goals, concentration issues, etc. Along with on-site intervention, she is also well-versed with the online mode of therapy.

Her approach utilizes empathetic and a non-judgemental attitude to create a safe space for individuals. As a therapist, she incorporates individual centric and strength-based practices to provide holistic intervention, while abiding by the highest ethical principles..

Nandita Sharma is an Institute Counselor in the Counselling section at IIT Jammu. Email: nandita.sharma@iitjammu.ac.in. Phone: 9033961612. Office: Level 108, 01-GH-I-45. Bio/profile: Nandita Sharma is RCI Licensed Clinical Psychologist and Educational Psychologist. She has extensive experience as an Academic Researcher and Practicing Psychologist at a medical institution, NGOs, and schools.

Her area of expertise lies in dealing with stress, restlessness, self-esteem, relationship issues, addiction,  grief, trauma, LGBTQIA+, anger issues, and procrastination. She is proficient in providing individual counseling & psychotherapy and administering and interpreting psychological assessments. She treats adolescents and adults in a unique environment while incorporating mindfulness, cognitive-behavioral, client-centric, and other strategies as appropriate.

She has also conducted seminars, awareness programs, and workshops for individuals, teachers, and working professionals..
Sanat Kumar Tiwari is the head or coordinator of the Counselling section at IIT Jammu. Designation: Coordinator - Counselling Services. Email: sanat.tiwari@iitjammu.ac.in. Phone: 0191-257-0281.
